R Jokhon tor Kache nijeke explain korlam je toke Valo basi toke Ami Pete chai thik tokhon thekei suru holo Tor ignore Tor obohela... R Setao khub voyongkor rokomer obohela... Tumi to nijei Janos tui kotota kothin chili.... Tor ei obohela R Amar kosto hoy seta tui jeneo Jokhon na janar ovinoy koros amake bujhte chas na kokhono... Abar eto din hoye geche ekhono projonto Kono dekha na kora r amake valo basos tarpore o amake biye Korte na chaoa... Ami eto Kore chacchi ekhon e biye Korte tarpore o Kono gurutto na deya ei gulo sob miliye Tor Upore Amar onek rag hoy but toke kichui bolte pari na karon toke Ami Valo basi... Abar toke biye Kore ki vabe rakhbo ki khaoabo eigulo vable Amar kache mone hoy Tor sundor Ekta life Ami nijer satther jonno nosto Kore docchi....Abar chokher samne Abba mar dhire dhire boyos o hocche hoito khub besi din Tara bachbe na... ma o thik moto ranna ba ghorer Kono kaj Korte pare na....sob miliye amio vitore vitore ses hoye jacchi..... but Moner kosto to r Mone chepe rakha jay na se gulu dur korar jonno Majhe moddhei nijeke poracchi madok er dhuay....
